mapper.insert: insert into wf_process_instance (id, process_Id, creator, create_Time, parent_Id, parent_Node_Name, expire_Time, last_Update_Time, last_Updator, order_No, variable, version) values (#{id}, #{processId}, #{creator}, #{createTime}, #{parentId}, #{parentNodeName}, #{expireTime}, #{lastUpdateTime}, #{lastUpdator}, #{orderNo}, #{variable}, #{version})
mapper.update: update wf_process_instance set last_Updator = #{lastUpdator}, last_Update_Time = #{lastUpdateTime}, variable = #{variable}, expire_Time = #{expireTime}, version = version + 1 where id = #{id} and version = #{version}
mapper.select: select o.id, o.process_Id, o.creator, o.create_Time, o.parent_Id, o.parent_Node_Name, o.expire_Time, o.last_Update_Time, o.last_Updator, o.priority, o.order_No, o.variable, o.version from wf_process_instance o where id = #{instanceId}
